--- Round 2 ---
<think>The question asks for "洋河股份的使用权资产是多少？" (What is Yanghe Shares' right-of-use assets?).

I opened DOC1_A5 and found the exact information. The <info> block shows:
|使用权资产|74,341,718.39|82,464,551.16|

This shows the right-of-use assets (使用权资产) with the current period value of 74,341,718.39 yuan and the beginning period value of 82,464,551.16 yuan.

I have found the evidence needed to answer the question. The document is DOC1 (《2024年一季度报告》) and it contains the right-of-use assets value for Yanghe Shares.

I should stop and provide the verbatim evidence from the <info> block.</think>
<search>{"action":"stop","reason":"found the exact right-of-use assets value in DOC1_A5"}</search>
<answer>|使用权资产|74,341,718.39|82,464,551.16|</answer>
